final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing technical instructional illustration showing how to deploy hermes inside a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan, with clearly labeled step-by-step panels.

Style/medium: needs a technical diagram / infographic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical multi-panel layout with clearly numbered steps 1, 2, 3, 4
Subject: must include all 4 steps across panels:
  Step 1: docker 环境准备 / 拉取 hermes 镜像
  Step 2: 启动 docker 容器 / 配置 hermes
  Step 3: 接入 glmcodingplan / 配置连接参数
  Step 4: 验证部署 / 运行测试
Scene/backdrop: must include a dark-themed terminal / IDE environment as backdrop context for each panel
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, technical documentation atmosphere — exact tone is yours
Color palette: needs a dark-mode developer-tool direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1" "2" "3" "4" (large, prominent), section headers and code snippets referencing "docker", "hermes", "glmcodingplan" (monospace code style)
Constraints: must preserve clear visual separation between each numbered step; code blocks and command lines must be legible and distinct
Avoid: must avoid decorative clutter that obscures the step flow; must avoid mixing step order
